summary: Sprint 2 Interaction Signals SSOT migration PASSED. All 24 backend tests pass. Frontend Pipeline, Journey, and Dashboard pages verified working with canonical signals from program_metrics.py.
critical_code_review_comments: services/program_metrics.py: VERIFIED - _compute_interaction_metrics() returns canonical signal fields (outreach_count, reply_count, has_coach_reply, days_since_activity, total_interactions)

services/program_metrics.py: VERIFIED - extract_signals() projects metrics into frontend-consumable shape with enriched fields (reply_rate, meaningful_interaction_count, engagement_trend, engagement_freshness_label, pipeline_health_state, data_confidence)
services/program_metrics.py: VERIFIED - batch_get_metrics() efficiently fetches cached metrics for multiple programs
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - Lines 568-599: list_programs uses batch_get_metrics + extract_signals for canonical signals
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - Lines 671-676: get_program uses get_metrics + extract_signals for single program
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - Lines 1127-1131: create_interaction calls recompute_metrics to invalidate cache
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - Lines 1185-1189: mark_as_replied calls recompute_metrics to invalidate cache
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - _compute_signals_from_interactions and _batch_signals REMOVED (comment at lines 38-42)
frontend/PipelinePage.js: VERIFIED - Line 24: Comment confirms computeAttention.js no longer used
frontend/PipelinePage.js: VERIFIED - Lines 189-194: Uses p.attention from backend directly
frontend/JourneyPage.js: VERIFIED - Lines 459, 993-1001: Reads signals.outreach_count, signals.reply_count, signals.has_coach_reply, signals.days_since_activity from backend

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Pipeline page, Journey page, Dashboard all working with canonical signals)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test interaction (TEST_Sprint2_interaction_cache_test) for cache invalidation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 Interaction Signals SSOT migration complete. All signal data now comes from services/program_metrics.py via extract_signals() and batch_get_metrics(). The _compute_signals_from_interactions() and _batch_signals() functions have been REMOVED from athlete_dashboard.py. Backend tests verify: (1) signals have core fields (outreach_count, reply_count, has_coach_reply, days_since_activity, total_interactions), (2) signals have enriched fields (reply_rate, meaningful_interaction_count, engagement_trend, engagement_freshness_label, pipeline_health_state, data_confidence), (3) attention computation works, (4) board_group uses canonical signals, (5) journey_rail works, (6) cache invalidation on interaction creation, (7) determinism across consecutive calls. Frontend verified: Pipeline page shows hero card with attention data, Priority/Kanban views work, Journey page shows Communication & Activity stats (Outreach, Replies, Interactions, Last Active) from canonical signals.

frontend_tests: Pipeline page loads - PASS: recruiting-board, pipeline-header, view-toggle found
Priority view - PASS: Hero card shows 'UCLA needs immediate attention — 5 others need follow-up'
Kanban view - PASS: Shows columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered) with school cards
Journey page (Creighton) - PASS: Shows Communication & Activity card with Outreach=0, Replies=0, Interactions=0, Last Active=—
Journey page (UCLA) - PASS: Shows Communication & Activity card with Outreach=3, Replies=1, Interactions=4, Last Active=10d
Journey page signals - PASS: Coach Watch shows 'Active' with 'High confidence', timeline shows 4 interactions
Dashboard page - PASS: Shows stats (6 schools, 75% response rate, 2 replies, 1 awaiting reply)

signals_ssot.backend_service: services/program_metrics.py is canonical source for all interaction-derived signals
signals_ssot.enriched_fields: reply_rate, meaningful_interaction_count, engagement_trend, engagement_freshness_label, pipeline_health_state, data_confidence
signals_ssot.dashboard: GET /api/athlete/dashboard uses batch_get_metrics + extract_signals for spotlight programs
signals_ssot.grouped: GET /api/athlete/programs?grouped=true returns groups with canonical signals

attention_computation.status: Working - programs have attention field with tier, attentionScore, attentionLevel

board_grouping.status: Working - uses signals.has_coach_reply for in_conversation classification

journey_rail.status: Working - has active and pulse fields, uses signals.outreach_count and signals.has_coach_reply

determinism.status: Verified - consecutive calls return identical signal values

frontend_consumption.PipelinePage: Uses p.attention from backend directly, no client-side recomputation
